regulations.title: Swiss VOC Ordinance Update
regulations.summary: Updated Swiss VOC Ordinance tightens emission limits for dairy manufacturing facilities.

regulations.title: EU Packaging and Packaging Waste Regulation

regulations.title: Corporate Sustainability Reporting Directive
regulations.summary: ESRS-compliant sustainability reporting for FY2024; large EU undertakings filing in 2026.
